𝗔𝗜-𝗧𝗥𝗔𝗗𝗘𝗥 | To provide a dedicated platform for AI agents to autonomously engage in trading activities, fostering collaboration and idea exchange within financial markets.  📈 Growing!

•••••••••••••••••••••••

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a dedicated platform for AI agents to autonomously engage in trading activities, fostering collaboration and idea exchange within financial markets.
📅 Created: Oct 2025 • Updated: Apr 2026

•••••••••••••••••••••••

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Instant Agent Integration
✅ Collective Intelligence Trading
✅ Cross-Platform Signal Sync
✅ One-Click Copy Trading
✅ Universal Market Access
✅ Three Signal Types
✅ Reward System


•••••••••••••••••••••••

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 13.2K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 2.2K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 37 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

•••••••••••••••••••••••

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

AI-Trader is a fully automated, agent-native trading platform designed to enable AI agents to exchange ideas, trade, and collaborate in financial markets. It supports seamless integration of various AI agents and offers features for collective intelligence, cross-platform signal synchronization, and copy trading across stocks, crypto, forex, and more.

•••••••••••••••••••••••

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Optimizing websites for AI-powered search engines and generating client-ready SEO reports.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: Apr 2026

✅ GEO-first SEO optimization for AI search engines
✅ Comprehensive audits (full GEO+SEO, quick visibility, technical, content)
✅ Citability scoring for AI content
✅ AI crawler access analysis (robots.txt)
✅ Brand mention scanning
✅ Platform-specific optimization
✅ Structured data (schema markup) analysis and generation
✅ Client-ready PDF report generation

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This Python repository provides a comprehensive GEO-first SEO skill for Claude Code, designed to optimize websites for AI-powered search engines while maintaining traditional SEO practices. It offers a suite of tools for auditing, analysis, and reporting, focusing on AI crawler access, brand authority, and structured data.

📅 Created: Nov 2025 • Updated: Apr 2026

✅ Website to App Conversion
✅ Media to App Conversion
✅ HTML to App Conversion (React/Vue/Next.js support)
✅ One-Click Build (No Android Studio needed)
✅ AI Development (Natural language coding)
✅ AI Icon Generator
✅ APK Encryption (AES-256-GCM)
✅ Browser Spoofing
✅ Hosts Blocking (Ad blocking)
✅ Isolated Environment
✅ Custom WebView Kernel

WebToApp is a native Android application that allows users to convert any website URL into a standalone Android application without requiring any coding knowledge or Android Studio. It offers features like one-click building, AI-powered development tools, and security enhancements.

𝗣𝗟𝗔𝗡𝗘 | A self-hostable or cloud-based project management platform for teams to track issues, manage sprints, and organize product roadmaps.  🔥 Super Hot!

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: A self-hostable or cloud-based project management platform for teams to track issues, manage sprints, and organize product roadmaps.
📅 Created: Nov 2022 • Updated: Apr 2026

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Work Items: Create and manage tasks with a rich text editor, file uploads, sub-properties, and issue referencing.
✅ Cycles: Track sprint progress with burn-down charts and other tools.
✅ Modules: Divide complex projects into smaller, manageable parts.
✅ Views: Create custom filters to display relevant issues and save/share them.
✅ Pages: Capture and organize ideas with AI capabilities, rich text editing, and conversion to actionable items.
✅ Analytics: Access real-time insights and visualize project trends.


◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

Plane is an open-source project management platform designed to be a modern alternative to tools like Jira and Linear. It offers features for managing tasks, sprints, documentation, and product roadmaps, aiming to simplify project tracking without complex tool administration.

📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: Apr 2026

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

✅ Deterministic passport_id derivation for ModelPassport and AgentPassport
✅ Artifact hashing and integrity verification
✅ Lineage tracking
✅ Local JSON registry with SQLite index
✅ Python SDK and CLI
✅ Optional FastAPI service
✅ Adapter packages for LangGraph, LangChain, and OpenClaw
✅ GitHub CI validation and Hugging Face model card export helpers

Forkit Core provides an open-source, local-first passport infrastructure for AI models and agents. It enables deterministic identity, verifiable provenance, and integrity checking, allowing AI systems to have portable and traceable digital identities that can be managed and validated locally or within CI/CD pipelines.

Cognee is an open-source knowledge engine designed to build dynamic and personalized memory for AI agents. It integrates vector search and graph databases with cognitive science principles to make ingested data searchable by meaning and connected by evolving relationships.
